# baiducloud_hpas_reserved_instance (Resource)

Use this resource to manage HPAS Reserved Instance.

~> **NOTE:** Destroying a reserved instance is not supported via API. Running `terraform destroy` will only remove the resource from Terraform state; the reserved instance itself will continue to run until it expires naturally.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "baiducloud_hpas_reserved_instance" "example" {
  name                  = "example-reserved"
  zone_name             = "cn-bj-a"
  app_type              = "llama2_7B_train"
  app_performance_level = "10k"
  payment_timing        = "NoPrepay"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_performance_level` (String) Performance level of the application. e.g., `10k`.
- `app_type` (String) Application type. e.g., `llama2_7B_train`.
- `name` (String) Name of the reserved instance. Supports uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and the special characters `-`, `_`, ` `, `/`, `.`. Must start with a letter. Length: 1–65.
- `zone_name` (String) Zone information, e.g., `cn-bj-a`.

### Optional

- `auto_renew_period` (Number) The automatic renewal time (month). Effective when `payment_timing` is `NoPrepay`. Valid values: `1`, `3`, `6`, `9`, `12`, `24`, `36`.
- `auto_renew_period_unit` (String) Auto renew time unit, currently only supports monthly.
- `ehc_cluster_id` (String) EHC cluster ID. If not specified, the system will automatically select the default EHC cluster.
- `payment_timing` (String) Payment timing of billing. Currently only `NoPrepay` is supported. Defaults to `NoPrepay`.
- `period` (Number) The reservation length (month). Effective when `payment_timing` is `NoPrepay`. Valid values: `1`, `3`, `6`, `9`, `12`, `24`, `36`. Defaults to `1`.
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags of the resource. Effective upon creation, modifications are not supported currently.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) Creation time of the reserved instance in ISO8601 format.
- `deduct_instance` (Boolean) Whether there is a deducting instance.
- `ehc_cluster_name` (String) Name of the EHC cluster.
- `expire_time` (String) Expiration time of the reserved instance in ISO8601 format.
- `hpas_id` (String) ID of the HPAS instance that was deducted in the previous billing period.
- `hpas_name` (String) Name of the HPAS instance that was deducted in the previous billing period.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) Status of the reserved instance. Possible values: `Creating`, `Active`, `Pending`, `Expired`, `Recharge`, `Deleted`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import baiducloud_hpas_reserved_instance.example <reserved_hpas_id>
```
